title: 10 best herbal teas for over bleeding during periods
intro_desc: Herbal teas for over bleeding during periods are natural remedies that help alleviate excessive menstrual bleeding by regulating hormonal balance and soothing the uterine lining. The best herbal teas for this issue include Vitex agnus-castus, Cimicifuga racemosa, Trifolium pratense, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Ginkgo biloba, Paeonia lactiflora, Angelica sinensis, Angelica archangelica, Althaea officinalis, and Lavandula angustifolia. If left untreated, over bleeding can lead to fatigue, weakness, and social isolation, negatively impacting daily life, work, and relationships.
